---
title: "GSE54650 mouse transcriptomic atlas - batch processing for BodyClocks"
output: github_document
---

```{r bodyclocks_setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
source(file.path("..", "R", "io_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "annotation_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "biomart_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "string_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "validation_utils.R"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "tables"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "reports"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "mouse"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "baboon"))
```

```{r libraries}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(rain)
library(biomaRt)
library(STRINGdb)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r load_data}
# Load all tissue datasets into a named list
tissues <- list(
  adrenal_gland = read.csv("data/raw/GSE54650/Adr.csv"),
  aorta         = read.csv("data/raw/GSE54650/Aor.csv"),
  brown_adipose = read.csv("data/raw/GSE54650/BFat.csv"),
  brain_stem    = read.csv("data/raw/GSE54650/Bstm.csv"),
  cerebellum    = read.csv("data/raw/GSE54650/Cer.csv"),
  heart         = read.csv("data/raw/GSE54650/Hrt.csv"),
  hypothalamus  = read.csv("data/raw/GSE54650/Hyp.csv"),
  kidney        = read.csv("data/raw/GSE54650/Kid.csv"),
  liver         = read.csv("data/raw/GSE54650/Liv.csv"),
  lung          = read.csv("data/raw/GSE54650/Lun.csv"),
  muscle        = read.csv("data/raw/GSE54650/Mus.csv"),
  white_adipose = read.csv("data/raw/GSE54650/WFat.csv")
)
```

```{r setup_connections}
# One-time setup: BioMart connection and phase colors

ensembl_mart <- connect_biomart("mmusculus_gene_ensembl")

phase_colors <- c(
  "0" = "greenyellow",    # ZT0/24 - lights on/sunrise
  "2" = "lightgreen",     # ZT2 - early morning
  "4" = "cyan",           # ZT4 - late morning
  "6" = "skyblue",        # ZT6 - noon (brightest)
  "8" = "lightyellow",    # ZT8 - early afternoon
  "10" = "yellow",        # ZT10 - late afternoon
  "12" = "gold",          # ZT12 - dusk/evening
  "14" = "orange",        # ZT14 - early evening
  "16" = "orangered",     # ZT16 - late evening
  "18" = "purple",        # ZT18 - early night
  "20" = "navy",          # ZT20 - night (darkest)
  "22" = "darkblue",      # ZT22 - late night
  "24" = "greenyellow"    # ZT24 - same as ZT0
)
```

```{r process_tissue}
process_tissue <- function(raw_data, tissue_name, ensembl_mart, phase_colors) {

  cat("\n========================================\n")
  cat("Processing:", tissue_name, "\n")
  cat("========================================\n")

  # --- 1. Collapse duplicate probes ---
  # Microarray data often has multiple probes per gene; keep the one with highest mean expression
  cat("Collapsing duplicate probes...\n")

  cleaned_data <- raw_data %>%
    mutate(mean_expr = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., -ENSEMBL, -Symbol))) %>%
    group_by(ENSEMBL) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = mean_expr, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::select(-mean_expr, -Symbol)

  cleaned_data <- as.data.frame(cleaned_data)
  rownames(cleaned_data) <- cleaned_data$ENSEMBL
  data <- cleaned_data[, -1]

  # --- 2. RAIN circadian analysis ---
  cat("Running RAIN analysis...\n")

  RAIN_result <- rain(t(data), deltat = 2, period = 24, nr.series = 1,
                      peak.border = c(0.3, 0.7), method = "independent",
                      adjp.method = 'ABH', verbose = TRUE)

  p_values <- RAIN_result$pVal
  RAIN_result$BH.Q <- p.adjust(p_values, method = "BH")
  RAIN_result$ENSEMBL <- row.names(RAIN_result)

  analysed <- merge(cleaned_data, RAIN_result, by.x = "ENSEMBL", by.y = "ENSEMBL", all.x = TRUE)

  # --- 3. BioMart gene annotation ---
  cat("Fetching BioMart annotations...\n")

  gene_info <- get_biomart_annotation(
    ids = analysed$ENSEMBL,
    mart = ensembl_mart,
    attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "mgi_symbol", "external_gene_name", "description"),
    filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
    cache_key = paste0("mouse_atlas_", tissue_name, "_gene_info")
  )

  gene_info <- gene_info %>%
    mutate(preferred_symbol = ifelse(!is.na(mgi_symbol) & mgi_symbol != "",
                                    mgi_symbol, external_gene_name))

  gene_info <- gene_info[!duplicated(gene_info$external_gene_name), ]
  gene_info$description <- gsub("\\[.*?\\]", "", gene_info$description)
  gene_info$description <- trimws(gene_info$description)

  merged <- merge(analysed, gene_info, by.x = "ENSEMBL", by.y = "ensembl_gene_id", all.x = TRUE)
  write.csv(merged, file.path("results", "tables", paste0(tissue_name, "_circ.csv")), row.names = FALSE)

  # --- 4. STRING network and enrichment ---
  cat("Building STRING network...\n")

  nodes_data <- merged %>%
    filter(BH.Q <= 0.05) %>%
    dplyr::rename(symbol = mgi_symbol)

  gene_list <- nodes_data$ENSEMBL
  enrichment_background_genes <- unique(rownames(data))

  out_dir <- file.path("results", "shiny_data", "mouse", tissue_name)
  dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

  gene_mapping <- create_gene_mapping(
    gene_ids = merged$ENSEMBL,
    symbols = nodes_data$symbol
  )
  cat("Created mapping for", length(gene_mapping), "genes\n")

  enrichment_backgrounds <- get_string_enrichment_backgrounds(
    foreground_genes = gene_list,
    tested_genes = enrichment_background_genes,
    species_id = 10090
  )
  enrichment_background_bundle <- build_string_enrichment_background_bundle(
    enrichment_backgrounds = enrichment_backgrounds,
    nodes_data = nodes_data,
    gene_info = gene_info,
    gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
    phase_colors = phase_colors,
    gene_info_symbol_col = "external_gene_name",
    phase_shift = -6
  )
  save_string_enrichment_background_bundle(
    enrichment_background_bundle,
    output_dir = out_dir,
    prefix = tissue_name
  )

  if (length(gene_list) == 0) {
    cat("WARNING: No significant genes (BH.Q <= 0.05) for", tissue_name,
        "- saving empty network RDS files\n")
    save_rds_checked(data.frame(), file = file.path(out_dir, paste0(tissue_name, "_nodes.rds")))
    save_string_edges_by_threshold(
      empty_string_edges_by_threshold(),
      output_dir = out_dir,
      prefix = tissue_name
    )
    save_rds_checked(data.frame(), file = file.path(out_dir, paste0(tissue_name, "_nodes_with_tooltips.rds")))
    save_rds_checked(data.frame(), file = file.path(out_dir, paste0(tissue_name, "_cluster_for_plot.rds")))
    save_rds_checked(data.frame(), file = file.path(out_dir, paste0(tissue_name, "_cluster_descriptions.rds")))
  } else {
    network_bundle <- get_string_network_bundle(
      gene_list = gene_list,
      gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
      species_id = 10090,
      nodes_data = nodes_data,
      include_enrichment = FALSE
    )
    network_outputs <- build_string_network_outputs(
      cluster_data = enrichment_backgrounds$backgrounds$all_string$cluster_data,
      nodes_data = nodes_data,
      gene_info = gene_info,
      gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
      phase_colors = phase_colors,
      gene_info_symbol_col = "external_gene_name",
      phase_shift = -6
    )
    save_string_network_outputs(
      outputs = network_outputs,
      edges = network_bundle$edges_by_threshold,
      output_dir = out_dir,
      prefix = tissue_name
    )
  }

  # --- 5. Plotting data ---
  cat("Preparing plotting data...\n")

  ct_cols <- paste0("CT", seq(18, 64, by = 2))
  atlas_plotting <- merged[, c("preferred_symbol", ct_cols)]
  colnames(atlas_plotting) <- c("Gene", as.character(seq(18, 64, by = 2)))

  qval_df <- merged[, c("preferred_symbol", "BH.Q")]
  colnames(qval_df) <- c("Gene", "BH.Q")

  atlas_plotting_long <- pivot_longer(atlas_plotting, cols = !Gene, names_to = "time_point", values_to = "mean")
  atlas_plotting_long <- inner_join(atlas_plotting_long, qval_df, by = "Gene")

  save_rds_checked(atlas_plotting_long, file = file.path(out_dir, paste0(tissue_name, "_data.rds")))

  # --- 6. Display table ---
  cat("Preparing display table...\n")

  ct_cycle1 <- paste0("CT", seq(18, 40, by = 2))
  ct_cycle2 <- paste0("CT", seq(42, 64, by = 2))

  dt <- merged
  for (i in seq_along(ct_cycle1)) {
    dt[[ct_cycle1[i]]] <- rowMeans(merged[, c(ct_cycle1[i], ct_cycle2[i])])
  }

  means <- dt[, ct_cycle1]
  min_val <- apply(means, 1, min)
  max_val <- apply(means, 1, max)
  Amp_fc_log2 <- log2(max_val / min_val)
  Amp_fc <- max_val / min_val

  dt <- cbind(dt, Amp_fc_log2, Amp_fc)

  display_dt <- dt %>%
    dplyr::select(preferred_symbol, description, pVal, BH.Q, Amp_fc_log2, phase) %>%
    dplyr::rename(symbol = preferred_symbol) %>%
    arrange(BH.Q)

  save_rds_checked(display_dt, file = file.path(out_dir, paste0(tissue_name, "_display_dt.rds")))

  cat("Done:", tissue_name, "\n")
}
```

```{r batch_process}
tissue_failures <- character()
for (tissue_name in names(tissues)) {
  tryCatch({
    process_tissue(
      raw_data     = tissues[[tissue_name]],
      tissue_name  = tissue_name,
      ensembl_mart = ensembl_mart,
      phase_colors = phase_colors
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("\nERROR processing", tissue_name, ":", e$message, "\n")
    tissue_failures[[tissue_name]] <<- conditionMessage(e)
  })
}
if (length(tissue_failures)) {
  stop(
    "Mouse atlas processing failed for: ",
    paste(names(tissue_failures), collapse = ", "),
    ". See the errors above; incomplete enrichment backgrounds must not be ",
    "deployed.",
    call. = FALSE
  )
}
```
